CustomField.formula: HYPERLINK( IF( Flosum__Component__c != null, '/' + Flosum__Component__r.Id , '/'+ Flosum__Metadata_Item__c), IF( Flosum__Component__c != null, Flosum__Component__r.Flosum__Component_Name__c , Flosum__Metadata_Item__r.Flosum__API_Name__c ), '_self')
CustomField.label: Component Name
